value.rationale: The page does mention "Evals" in the navigation menu (under Research) and references evaluation methodology URLs, but it does not describe or offer an "Evals / testing harness" product or feature that allows users to "run evaluations / test suites against the agent's behavior." The "Evals" link in the nav appears to point to Google DeepMind's own internal benchmark evaluations/publications, not a developer tool or harness for testing agents. There is no description on the page of a product or service enabling customers to run evaluations or test suites against agent behavior.
